purpose: Track public-safe second-level flagship candidates discovered during whole-workstation substrate assessment before promoting them into runtime dependencies or the revival registry.
evidence_basis: Index MCP map over the operator development root reported 124 repositories: 114 public-class and 10 local-class.
Forum MCP route returned low confidence and escalation with project-telos as the leading lane for second-level candidate assessment.
Parallel read-only explorer passes used metadata, README/package/config/test names, and git metadata only.
README SHA256 values were recorded for public-safe candidates; private/local-only candidate detail remains in ignored local packets.

privacy_boundary.rule: Public docs may record lane families, capability summaries, README hashes, risk boundaries, and first actions. Private client data, credentials, operator runbooks, local state payloads, and secret-bearing tool bodies stay outside git.

public_candidates.value: Creative-verification loop for generated artifacts, criteria, refinement, composition, choreography, and witnessed outputs.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Adapters should stay fixture-backed until scene/world packets and generated programs are treated as untrusted inputs.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a Telos adapter smoke test around the minimal reconcile loop and publish a World/media graph packet mapping.

public_candidates.value: Experience frontend and creative-verification engine lineage for witnessed Worlds, GLSL render programs, audio programs, timelines, and receipts.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Generated worlds, render programs, and audio programs are untrusted until constrained by packet schemas and tests.
public_candidates.first_action: Define the Telos World packet schema and one golden minimal render/audio receipt test.

public_candidates.value: Hash-stamped provenance and claim-check sensor layer that can feed evidence-first workflows.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Receipts may reference evidence but must not embed secret-bearing evidence or private payload bodies.
public_candidates.first_action: Define the Telos provenance receipt ingestion contract and one sanitized claim-check fixture.

public_candidates.value: Evidence packet and witness validation surface for reviewer-facing proof bundles.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Witness packets must redact absolute private paths and private artifact labels before public export.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a sanitized proof-bundle export fixture and a Crucible report join test.

public_candidates.value: Model and artifact attestation validation candidate for model-foundry promotion gates.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Validate attestations and metadata only; do not require model weights, private manifests, or private datasets.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a Telos model-artifact attestation adapter doc and fixture test.

public_candidates.value: Public exposure hygiene and release-readiness scanner for repos, docs, and artifacts.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Default profiles should scan public metadata and release surfaces, not private clones or local state.
public_candidates.first_action: Create a Telos public-surface check profile and regression fixture.

public_candidates.value: Deterministic routing and context-budget helper candidate for Forum and large-workspace workflows.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Routing hints are advisory and must not encode hidden policy authority or private tool names.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a Telos lane-router adapter doc and route classification tests.

public_candidates.value: Hook and workflow-interception candidate for turning agent actions into receipts and review gates.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Hooks must be explicit, local, and reviewable; no hidden automation or private transcript export.
public_candidates.first_action: Map hook events to Telos action receipts and add a synthetic hook fixture.

public_candidates.value: Membrane substrate for perception, criteria, and evidence separation across agent workflows.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Extract interfaces and fixtures only; do not import operator-specific policy corpora as shared defaults.
public_candidates.first_action: Define a minimal Telos membrane API and run a focused contract test slice.

public_candidates.value: Small harness candidate for repeatable local workflow sessions, approvals, and result capture.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Harness exports should be synthetic or redacted and must not serialize private operator state by default.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a Telos session-export fixture that joins ledger entries to action receipts.

public_candidates.value: Evidence-first accountability substrate for proof-before-trust workflows, human/model calibration, and receipt-gated work claims.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Promote mechanisms and fixtures only; do not convert personal reflective prose into runtime policy or hidden authority.
public_candidates.first_action: Extract a minimal done-claim receipt schema and join it to Telos action receipts plus Crucible verdicts.

public_candidates.value: Witnessed perception, pre-execution gate, durable memory, and verify-after-act surface for accountable model operation.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Perception and gates are adapter contracts; hosts must not treat witnessed observations as self-authorization.
public_candidates.first_action: Map perceive-gate-act-verify-witness records onto Telos proposed/admission/execution/review receipt stages.

public_candidates.value: C++23 anomaly detection kernels for baselines, robust scoring, and temporal alert correlation in telemetry quality gates.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Analytics library only; no execution, intrusion, credential, or response automation primitives are exposed through Telos.
public_candidates.first_action: Add a synthetic objective-monitor fixture that emits baseline and anomaly-score packets for Crucible measurement gates.

public_candidates.value: Header-only C++23 signal and information-theory library for entropy, transfer information, divergences, forecasting, change-points, and graph curvature.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Deterministic analytics only; generated measurements must carry units, input hashes, and bounded fixture data.
public_candidates.first_action: Define Telos signal-measurement packets for entropy and change-point fixtures before runtime integration.

public_candidates.value: Reward-function observability concept for catching proxy optimization and reward hacking patterns before they masquerade as progress.
public_candidates.risk_boundary: Treat as observability inspiration and fork-local code until upstream license, divergence, and attribution are reviewed for each imported primitive.
public_candidates.first_action: Build a Telos objective-monitor fixture that contrasts proxy score movement with independent quality verdicts.

private_local_tranches.value: Private/local IO guardrails and redaction tools should feed Gather, Index, and Telos safe IO adapters after scrubbed synthetic fixtures exist.
private_local_tranches.public_boundary: Do not publish raw IO payloads, transform tables, local policy state, or private paths.

private_local_tranches.value: Private/local release assurance tools should feed Crucible release gates and Repo Proof Index style proof packets.
private_local_tranches.public_boundary: Do not publish private proof artifacts; treat them as attestations and publish only schemas, synthetic fixtures, and redacted receipts.

private_local_tranches.value: Private/local sensorium tools should feed Telos measurement and event packet schemas.
private_local_tranches.public_boundary: Do not publish raw sensor payloads; emit abstract event schemas and sample synthetic events only.

private_local_tranches.value: Private/local agent audit tools should feed Forum ledger summaries, Crucible review, and Telos loop ledgers.
private_local_tranches.public_boundary: No agent transcript bodies or secret-bearing audit reports in public samples.

private_local_tranches.value: Private/local graphics, rendering, and composition repos should feed the creative engine after asset/license provenance checks.
private_local_tranches.public_boundary: No third-party assets, purchased fonts, proprietary shader payloads, or unlicensed media may be committed.

next_actions: Keep the active 13-tool revival registry for candidates with immediate flagship host contracts.
Promote second-level candidates into the registry only after a fixture or adapter contract exists.
Create ignored local packets for private/local candidate details and never publish raw private viability notes.
Use Crucible to turn the first adapter claim for each lane into MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE.
